presentation.text: **Big Data Engineer with 5 years of experience**, specialized in the design, development, optimization and **maintenance** of data pipelines (**NiFi, Kafka, Spark, Elasticsearch, Airflow**, etc). I support business teams in data valorization while ensuring the reliability and scalability of processing. I also have solid experience in **backend API development (FastAPI, Java, Spring) and Cloud deployment (GCP, AWS) with DevOps practices (Kubernetes, GitLab CI, Jenkins)**.

experiences.title: Big Data Engineer

missions.description:
- Design and development of **Natural Language Processing (NLP)** features in **Java and Scala**.
- Implementation of a pipeline validating daily **XML** files via **JAXB** using **XSD** schemas
- Deployment and maintenance of 4 batch ETL chains in **REXX**.
- Creation of an **Angular 20** UI for business data visualization.
- Administration of **Kafka** topics and streams for data streaming.
- Implementation of observability (SLO/monitoring) via **Prometheus and Grafana** dashboards.
- Management of **CI/CD pipelines (GLPI, Jenkins, SVN)** including documentation writing, unit tests and code reviews.

results.description: Production deployment of 2 critical processing chains.
Processing of thousands of financial records.

contexts.description: Integrated into a team of 9 people working in Agile (developers, product managers), I work on designing new features and maintaining 4 strategic ETL chains. These pipelines process judicial and financial data of European companies, the business challenge being to guarantee 100% reliability of data for about ten documents per day.

missions.description: - Design and development of new features for ETL chains based on **Kafka**, **Spark** and **ElasticSearch**.
- Development and implementation of a **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)** solution for an **internal LLM (Dinootoo)**.
- Operational maintenance of **Big Data applications (Kafka, Spark, NiFi, ElasticSearch, Airflow)**.
- Testing applications from on-premise to GCP environments (Cloud Composer, **BigQuery**, **Big Table**)
- Update and optimization of **GCP DataFlow** packages in Python.
- Industrialization via **CI/CD integration (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GCP)**.

results.description: Improvement and generalization of 2 pipeline features, correcting 50% of transformation errors.
Successful update of all Python packages for **GCP Dataflow**, ensuring job security and performance.

contexts.description: Orange, French telecommunications leader, undertook the migration of its data to **GCP Cloud**. Within a team of 15 people, I accompanied this transition by optimizing ETL pipelines. The business challenge was to ensure continuity of Big Data applications while controlling Google Cloud costs.

environments.description: **Python**, Scala, **Java**, GitLab, GCP, Jira Confluence, **Kafka**, ElasticSearch, **Bash**, AirFlow, DataFlow, Jenkins

missions.description:
++**Achievements:**++

* **Operational maintenance** of Big Data infrastructure (**Apache Hadoop HDFS, Kafka, Spark, NiFi, ElasticSearch, Airflow, GitLab**).
* Data Quality control via automated Python scripts.
* Design, implementation and **maintenance** of ETL pipelines (creation and optimization of **NiFi** flowfiles)
* Development and deployment of APIs (**FastAPI**) for documentation data exposure.
* Security certificates management (**Kafka/ElasticSearch/NiFi**).
* Continuous integration and deployment (**GitLab CI, Kubernetes, Docker, Nexus**).
* **Agile Scrum rituals** and technical documentation writing.

++**Challenge:**++

The objective was to calculate the valid retention period and make visually exploitable the volume of unconsumed data on Kafka, within a distributed cluster.

++**Resolution:**++

In collaboration with the Tech Lead, I implemented Kafka metrics export to **Prometheus** and designed custom **Grafana** dashboards, thus offering immediate visibility to engineers.

results.description: Design and development of 2 internal tooling applications in Angular.
End-to-end deployment of an ETL chain processing approximately 50 GB per day.
Resolution of more than 50 production incidents, maintaining 99% uptime.
Creation of a centralized Big Data component access portal, increasing team productivity.
Refactoring and update of a critical Scala application.

contexts.description: Within the FDJ **Data Lake Production** team, I am responsible for the reliability and availability of critical data. My role is to ensure ETL pipeline maintenance, API development and monitoring dashboard creation. The business challenge is to guarantee accuracy in data availability while ensuring compliance.

missions.description:
* End-to-end Data Science project management.
* Design of mathematical algorithms for identification and generation of bounding boxes covering essential texts.
* Development, model accuracy evaluation and application testing.
* Deployment of the packaged model on Microsoft Azure cloud.

results.description:
* Production deployment of an organizational chart image recognition application on Azure Functions.
* Model accuracy reaching 95% with processing latency under 200 ms per document.

contexts.description: Development of an OCR (Computer Vision) algorithm to extract and structure texts present in organizational chart images. The business challenge was to automate the entry of these documents to save 90% of manual processing time.

experiences.title: Full Stack Python Vue.js Developer
experiences.description: FactSet, global provider of integrated financial information

missions.description:
* Design, development, documentation and maintenance of 3 critical APIs in **Python/FastAPI**.
* Fullstack participation (component enrichment via **Vue.js**).
* Implementation of continuous integration via **GitHub** and deployment on **AWS**.
* Writing unit tests (**PyTest**) and creation of **Mocks** via Swagger.
* Daily collaboration with international project teams.

results.description:
* Delivery of 3 secured APIs processing up to 10,000 requests per day.
* Test coverage maintained above 90%.

contexts.description: Integrated into the 'Deep Sector' project providing enriched financial data on TMT sectors (Technologies, Media, Telecommunications). Within an Agile team of 20 people (developers, Scrum Master, PO), my role was to improve data access for clients with high availability and low latency constraints.

experiences.title: Axens
experiences.description: Axens Group provides a complete range of solutions for the conversion of oil and biomass to cleaner fuels, the production and purification of major petrochemical intermediates, the chemical recycling of plastics, all natural gas treatment and conversion options, water treatment as well as carbon capture & storage solutions.

missions.description:
* End-to-end Data Science project management.
* Design of Artificial Intelligence algorithms for time series prediction.
* Development, model accuracy evaluation and application testing in Microsoft Azure environment.
* Deployment of an automated prediction job (via **Bash** and **cron**) running weekly.

results.description:
* Production deployment of a predictive algorithm on Azure environment.
* Implementation of reliable alerts based on physico-chemical indicators.
* Technical failure prediction accuracy on the process reached 99.99%

contexts.description: Development of a time series prediction algorithm to extract key indicators and trigger alerts on an oil production process. The business challenge was to understand physico-chemical processes and propose predictions with very high accuracy.

educations.description: Demanding curriculum in applied mathematics foundations such as functional analysis, advanced probabilities and statistics, implementing cutting-edge industry algorithms on computer, realizing deep learning and artificial intelligence projects
Curriculum mastering both mathematical knowledge and computer science practices

events.name: JEC World leading international composite show

certificates.name: Big Data Analysis with Scala and Spark
